## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test (or rationale below)
- [ ] No tokens, ADO organization names, or other sensitive strings in
      the diff
